basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad has released the official notification for 1 JRF posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy layer)/ Female candidates as per GOI/DST rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech in Petroleum Engineering/Chemical Engineering/M. Sc. In Chemistry with more than 60% marks or equivalent CGPA/OGPA and GATE/NET qualified
qualification.details: JRF: M.E./M.Tech in Petroleum Engineering/Chemical Engineering/M. Sc. In Chemistry; with more than 60% marks or equivalent CGPA/OGPA. Candidate must be GATE/NET qualified.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000/- + Applicable HRA per month for first two years and Rs. 42000/- + Applicable HRA per month thereafter.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.iitism.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the JRF position is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech in Petroleum Engineering/Chemical Engineering or an M.Sc. in Chemistry with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA/OGPA. GATE/NET qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy layer)/ Female candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF position is Rs. 37000/- + Applicable HRA per month for the first two years, and Rs. 42000/- + Applicable HRA per month thereafter.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JRF position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You must download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents via post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this JRF recruitment is SERB(CRG)(420)/2023-2024/1089/PE.

faq.question: Q9. Which department or project is this JRF position for?
faq.answer: The advertisement number suggests it is related to a project funded by SERB (Science and Engineering Research Board) under the CRG (Core Research Grant) scheme.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The official website of Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad is https://www.iitism.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.
